Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Open form and sync
Description: Field Agent opens app syncs over WiFi and navigates to Community Registration Form 1A
Acceptance Criteria: Form 1A opens with blank fields
Custom Field (Test Step): Open app > sync over WiFi > tap Community & Beneficiary Registration > Community Registration
Custom Field (Expected Result): Form 1A opens with all fields blank

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - GPS capture
Description: Field Agent taps GPS field and stands at community center
Acceptance Criteria: Coordinates auto-captured lat/lon populated
Custom Field (Test Step): Tap GPS field > stand at community center

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Mine site lookup
Description: Field Agent selects Koumba Gold Mine from mine_site lookup table
Acceptance Criteria: Dropdown populated from lookup table; selection saved as parent reference
Custom Field (Test Step): Tap mine_site field > select Koumba Gold Mine from dropdown
Custom Field (Expected Result): Dropdown populated from lookup table; selection saved as parent reference

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Population validation pass
Description: Field Agent enters estimated_population=350 and num_households=72
Acceptance Criteria: Integers accepted; validation passes

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Distance validation pass
Description: Field Agent enters distance_from_mine_km=12.5
Acceptance Criteria: Decimal accepted; validation passes (0.1-500)

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Multi-select livelihoods
Description: Field Agent selects farming and fishing as primary livelihoods
Acceptance Criteria: Both values saved correctly

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Submit and case created
Description: Field Agent submits form; community case created in CommCare
Acceptance Criteria: Community case created; registration_date auto-set to today; visible in supervisor dashboard
Custom Field (Expected Result): Community case created in CommCare; registration_date = today

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Negative: population zero
Description: Field Agent enters estimated_population=0
Acceptance Criteria: Validation error displayed; form does not submit
Custom Field (Expected Result): Validation error displayed; form does not submit

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Negative: distance out of range
Description: Field Agent enters distance_from_mine_km=600
Acceptance Criteria: Validation error displayed; form does not submit
Custom Field (Expected Result): Validation error displayed; form does not submit

Summary: UAT-01 Community Registration - Negative: blank community name
Description: Field Agent leaves community_name blank and tries to submit
Acceptance Criteria: Form does not submit; required field error shown
Custom Field (Expected Result): Required field error; form does not submit

Summary: UAT-02 Beneficiary Registration - Select community and open form
Description: Field Agent selects Tsarahonenana from case list and opens Form 1B
Acceptance Criteria: Form 1B opens with community pre-selected
Custom Field (Test Step): Tap Beneficiary Registration > select Tsarahonenana from case list

Summary: UAT-02 Beneficiary Registration - Age auto-calculation
Description: Field Agent enters DOB 15/03/1991; age auto-calculates to 34
Acceptance Criteria: age field = 34 calculated from today minus DOB

Summary: UAT-02 Beneficiary Registration - Vulnerability status display logic
Description: vulnerability_status field appears because age >= 5
Acceptance Criteria: Field visible; select widow + chronic_illness
Custom Field (Test Step): Enter DOB for age >= 5 > confirm vulnerability_status field appears

Summary: UAT-02 Beneficiary Registration - Occupation not defaulting to student
Description: primary_occupation does not default to student for age >= 18
Acceptance Criteria: Farmer selected without auto-default to student
Custom Field (Test Step): Enter DOB for age >= 18 > open primary_occupation field
Custom Field (Expected Result): No auto-default to student; farmer selectable

Summary: UAT-02 Beneficiary Registration - Case created as child of community
Description: Submit form; beneficiary case created as child of Tsarahonenana
Acceptance Criteria: Beneficiary case created; parent = Tsarahonenana community case
Custom Field (Test Step): Complete all fields > set consent = Yes > Submit
Custom Field (Expected Result): Beneficiary case created as child of Tsarahonenana

Summary: UAT-02 Beneficiary Registration - Negative: consent No blocks submit
Description: Field Agent sets consent_given=No and tries to submit
Acceptance Criteria: Form does not submit; consent validation error shown
Custom Field (Expected Result): Form does not submit; validation error shown

Summary: UAT-02 Beneficiary Registration - Negative: vulnerability hidden for age < 5
Description: vulnerability_status field does NOT appear for age < 5
Acceptance Criteria: vulnerability_status field hidden
Custom Field (Test Step): Enter DOB for age < 5 > verify vulnerability_status field

Summary: UAT-03 Health Activity Report - Conditional fields health_education
Description: Select activity_type=health_education; verify health_topic appears and num_children_under5 does not
Acceptance Criteria: health_topic visible; num_children_under5 hidden
Custom Field (Expected Result): health_topic appears; num_children_under5 does NOT appear

Summary: UAT-03 Health Activity Report - Conditional fields vaccination
Description: Select activity_type=vaccination; verify num_children_under5 appears
Acceptance Criteria: num_children_under5 field visible

Summary: UAT-03 Health Activity Report - Total beneficiaries auto-calc
Description: Enter male=0 female=28; total auto-calculates to 28
Acceptance Criteria: num_beneficiaries_total = 28

Summary: UAT-03 Health Activity Report - health_visit case created
Description: Submit form; health_visit case created under Tsarahonenana
Acceptance Criteria: health_visit case created; visible in supervisor dashboard
Custom Field (Expected Result): health_visit case created as child of Tsarahonenana

Summary: UAT-03 Health Activity Report - Negative: date > 30 days past
Description: Enter activity_date = 31 days ago
Acceptance Criteria: Validation error; date not accepted

Summary: UAT-04 Health Visit Follow-up - Case auto-closes on completed
Description: Set followup_status=completed and submit; health_visit case auto-closes
Acceptance Criteria: health_visit case closed; no longer in open case list
Custom Field (Test Step): Select open health_visit > set followup_status = completed > Submit

Summary: UAT-04 Health Visit Follow-up - Case stays open on ongoing
Description: Set followup_status=ongoing; case remains open
Acceptance Criteria: Case remains in open case list

Summary: UAT-05 Education Activity Report - school_supplies conditional logic
Description: Select education_type=school_supplies; verify scholarship_amount and training_duration_days do not appear
Acceptance Criteria: Both conditional fields hidden
Custom Field (Expected Result): scholarship_amount and training_duration_days do NOT appear

Summary: UAT-05 Education Activity Report - Total students auto-calc
Description: Enter male=22 female=23; total auto-calculates to 45
Acceptance Criteria: num_students_total = 45

Summary: UAT-05 Education Activity Report - Auto-close on completed
Description: Set completion_status=completed; education_activity case auto-closes on submit
Acceptance Criteria: Case created and immediately auto-closed
Custom Field (Expected Result): education_activity case created and immediately auto-closed

Summary: UAT-05 Education Activity Report - scholarship_amount appears for scholarship type
Description: Select education_type=scholarship; verify scholarship_amount field appears
Acceptance Criteria: scholarship_amount field visible

Summary: UAT-06 Environmental Monitoring - water_quality conditional fields
Description: Select monitoring_type=water_quality; verify water_ph and water_turbidity appear
Acceptance Criteria: Both fields visible; reforestation fields hidden
Custom Field (Expected Result): water_ph and water_turbidity appear; other type fields hidden

Summary: UAT-06 Environmental Monitoring - corrective action field appears
Description: Set corrective_action_needed=yes; corrective_action_desc appears
Acceptance Criteria: corrective_action_desc field visible

Summary: UAT-06 Environmental Monitoring - photo_evidence_1 required
Description: Submit without photo_evidence_1
Acceptance Criteria: Validation error; form does not submit

Summary: UAT-06 Environmental Monitoring - High risk case stays open
Description: Submit with risk_level=high; env_monitoring case created and remains open
Acceptance Criteria: Case created with risk_level=high; case open
Custom Field (Expected Result): env_monitoring case created and stays OPEN

Summary: UAT-06 Environmental Monitoring - Negative: pH out of range
Description: Enter water_ph=15
Acceptance Criteria: Validation error; 0-14 only

Summary: UAT-07 Grievance Registration - Anonymous reporting allowed
Description: Leave reporter_name blank; form accepts submission
Acceptance Criteria: Form accepts blank reporter_name
Custom Field (Test Step): Leave reporter_name blank > complete other fields > Submit
Custom Field (Expected Result): Form accepts blank; grievance created anonymously

Summary: UAT-07 Grievance Registration - Description min length validation
Description: Enter description with fewer than 20 characters
Acceptance Criteria: Validation error; min 20 chars required

Summary: UAT-07 Grievance Registration - Case created with status open
Description: Submit grievance form; case created with resolution_status=open
Acceptance Criteria: Grievance case created; resolution_status = open (auto-set)

Summary: UAT-08 Grievance Follow-up - days_to_resolve auto-calculated
Description: Set resolution_status=resolved; days_to_resolve auto-calculates
Acceptance Criteria: days_to_resolve = followup_date minus report_date (correct count)
Custom Field (Test Step): Set resolution_status = resolved > verify days_to_resolve field

Summary: UAT-08 Grievance Follow-up - community_satisfied appears on resolved
Description: Set resolution_status=resolved; community_satisfied field appears
Acceptance Criteria: community_satisfied field visible

Summary: UAT-08 Grievance Follow-up - Case auto-closes on resolved
Description: Submit with resolution_status=resolved; grievance case auto-closes
Acceptance Criteria: Grievance case closed; no longer in open list

Summary: UAT-09 Community Consultation Log - Standalone form no case created
Description: Submit Form 6C; verify NO case is created
Acceptance Criteria: Form submitted as standalone data; no case in case list
Custom Field (Expected Result): No case created; form data submitted only

Summary: UAT-10 Offline Sync - Data captured offline and synced
Description: Enable airplane mode; complete Form 1A; re-enable WiFi; sync
Acceptance Criteria: All queued forms submitted; cases created; no data loss
Custom Field (Test Step): Enable airplane mode > complete Form 1A > re-enable WiFi > sync
Custom Field (Expected Result): Cases created post-sync; GPS photos and case properties intact

Summary: UAT-11 RBAC - Field Agent cannot access web dashboard
Description: Log in as Field Agent; attempt to access web dashboard
Acceptance Criteria: Web dashboard not accessible; mobile app only
Custom Field (Test Step): Log in as Field Agent > attempt to navigate to web dashboard

Summary: UAT-11 RBAC - ESG Director is read-only
Description: Log in as ESG Director; attempt to edit or submit a form
Acceptance Criteria: No edit access; read-only dashboard only
Custom Field (Test Step): Log in as ESG Director > attempt to modify a case or submit a form

Summary: UAT-12 Dashboard - Filters apply correctly
Description: Apply date range Q1 2026 and mine site Koumba Gold Mine filters
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard updates to show filtered data only
Custom Field (Test Step): Log in as CSR Manager > apply Date Range = Q1 2026 and Mine Site = Koumba Gold Mine
Custom Field (Expected Result): Dashboard updates; only Koumba Gold Mine Q1 data shown

Summary: UAT-12 Dashboard - 4 summary cards populate
Description: Verify 4 summary cards display correct counts
Acceptance Criteria: Total Communities; Total Beneficiaries; Total Activities; Open Grievances all populated
Custom Field (Test Step): Navigate to Overview tab > verify 4 summary cards
Custom Field (Expected Result): All four cards show correct counts matching test data

Summary: UAT-12 Dashboard - GRI 14 export downloads correctly
Description: Click Export GRI 14 Report
Acceptance Criteria: CSV downloads with correct column structure per Functional Spec §12.2
Custom Field (Expected Result): CSV file downloads; columns match GRI 14 mapping

Summary: UAT-13 KPI - Beneficiary gender ratio calculation
Description: Verify beneficiary gender ratio = (female / total) x 100
Acceptance Criteria: Matches manual calculation from test data
Custom Field (Test Step): Note female and total beneficiary counts > compare to dashboard gender ratio %

Summary: UAT-13 KPI - Grievance resolution rate calculation
Description: Verify grievance resolution rate = (resolved / total) x 100
Acceptance Criteria: Matches manual calculation
Custom Field (Test Step): Note resolved and total grievance counts > compare to dashboard resolution rate %
